c.d: Number of active users on the platform. A larger user base increases the likelihood of a sale.
Listing fees, commission fees, and payment processing fees charged by the app.
The specific demographic or type of buyer that the app caters to (e.g., fashion enthusiasts, collectors, local buyers).
The simplicity and intuitiveness of the app's interface for listing items, managing inventory, and communicating with buyers.
The availability of prepaid shipping labels, integrated shipping services, and options for local pickup.
The security measures in place to protect sellers from fraud and ensure timely payments.
Types of the items that you can list on the app.
Tools available to sellers to help them manage their listings and sales (e.g., inventory management, analytics, marketing tools).
